name: Annex XXV Return on Large Exposures
content:
**Annex XXV Return on Large Exposures**

Annex XXV Return on Large Exposures Name of the NBFC Return for the Month Eligible Capital base (Tier 1) (₹ crore) A. NBFC’s 10 Largest Exposures to counterparties (single as well as group of connected counterparties) irrespective of their values relative to NBFC’s eligible capital base Sl No. Name of the Counterparty Whether Single (S) or Group (G) of connected Counterparties Exposure Amount Exposure as % of Tier 1 capital 1. 2. 3. -- -- 10. B. NBFC’s Large Exposures with values equal to or above 10% of Tier 1 capital Sl No. Name of the Counterparty Whether Single (S) or Group (G) of connected Counterparties Exposure Amount Exposure as % of Tier 1 capital 1. 2.

-324- -- n C. NBFC’s other exposures (measured without offsetting credit transfer instruments) with values equal to or above 10% of Tier 1 capital (not including exposures reported in B already) Sl No. Name of the Counterparty Whether Single (S) or Group (G) of connected Counterparties Exposure Amount Exposure as % of Tier 1 capital 1. 2. -- n. D. NBFC’s exempted exposures with values equal to or above 10% of Tier 1 capital Sl No. Name of the Counterparty Whether Single (S) or Group (G) of connected Counterparties Exposure Amount Exposure as % of Tier 1 capital 1. 2. -- n.
